entities.name: ALLELOPATHY
entities.description: The chemical inhibition of one plant by another through the release of allelochemicals)

entities.name: RAINFED CROP PRODUCTION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Farming systems that rely solely on rainfall for water supply)

entities.name: INTERCROPS
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops simultaneously in the same field)

entities.name: CROP SEQUENCES
entities.description: The specific order in which different crops are planted on a piece of land)

entities.name: CROP ROTATIONS
entities.description: The practice of growing a series of different types of crops in the same area across a sequence of seasons)

entities.name: POOR GERMINATION
entities.description: The reduced ability of seeds to sprout and develop)

entities.name: LOW CROP STAND
entities.description: A low density of established plants in a field)

entities.name: CROP GROWTH
entities.description: The physical development and increase in size of a crop)

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop yield per unit area)

entities.name: RESIDUAL TOXICITY
entities.description: The presence of harmful allelochemicals remaining in the soil)

entities.name: MONOCULTURES
entities.description: The cultivation of a single crop species in a given area)

entities.name: WEEDS
entities.description: Unwanted plants that compete with crops for resources)

entities.name: HERBICIDE USE
entities.description: The application of chemical substances to kill unwanted plants)

entities.name: HERBICIDE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherited ability of a weed population to survive herbicide application)

entities.name: NUTRIENT AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of essential nutrients accessible to plants in the soil)

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: A region characterized by low rainfall and high temperatures)

entities.name: INDIAN SUBCONTINENT
entities.description: The geographical region of South Asia)

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by living organisms such as pests or pathogens)

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by non-living environmental factors like drought or salinity)

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Grass crops grown for their edible seeds)

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Plants of the pea family used for food or soil nitrogen fixation)

entities.name: OILSEEDS
entities.description: Crops grown primarily for the extraction of oil from their seeds)

entities.name: COMMERCIAL CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown primarily for sale in the market)

entities.name: ALLELOCHEMICALS
entities.description: Biochemicals produced by an organism that influence the growth and survival of other organisms)

entities.name: RESIDUE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The handling and treatment of crop remains after harvest)

entities.name: DISEASE BUILD UP
entities.description: The accumulation of plant pathogens in the soil over time)

entities.name: PARASITIC WEEDS
entities.description: Weeds that derive nutrients and water from a host plant)

entities.name: SYNTHETIC HERBICIDE USAGE
entities.description: The use of man-made chemical herbicides for weed control)

entities.name: HEALTH
entities.description: The state of physical well-being of humans)
